definitions.es: Estar presente en un evento o reunión.
definitions.vi: Có mặt tại một sự kiện hoặc buổi họp.
definitions.en: To be present at an event or gathering.

example.vi: Tôi sẽ tham dự buổi họp vào ngày mai.
example.en: I will attend the meeting tomorrow.

exampleSentences: Ngày mai anh sẽ tham dự buổi họp quan trọng ở công ty.
Em rất vui khi được tham dự sinh nhật của bạn thân.
Chị không thể tham dự lớp học hôm nay vì bị ốm.
notes:
Tham dự = to attend, to be present at an event. It’s used for meetings, events, ceremonies, classes — situations where you show up.

It’s more formal than just dự, and more neutral than tham gia (which implies actively joining in).  
You tham dự something; you don’t use it for casual hangouts.

Memory tip: tham dự = show up, tham gia = take part.
exampleSentencesTranslated: Tomorrow I will attend an important meeting at the company.
I am very happy to attend my best friend's birthday.
She cannot attend class today because she is sick.
notes_md:
**Tham dự** = to attend, to be present at an event. It’s used for meetings, events, ceremonies, classes — situations where you show up.

It’s more formal than just **dự**, and more neutral than **tham gia** (which implies actively joining in).  
You *tham dự* something; you don’t use it for casual hangouts.


Memory tip: **tham dự = show up**, **tham gia = take part**.
